title: What's New
subtitle: Here's what we've been working on.

features.title: Flexible Budget Periods
features.description: Set a custom month start date, or switch to weekly or biweekly budget cycles in Settings.

features.title: Theming
features.description: Themes now tint the entire app background. Head to Settings to try a new look.

features.title: Smarter Category Tracking
features.description: Improved budget category inference so your expenses land in the right bucket automatically.
